goal: 修复 Mainline seal overlap conflict 的 agent closeout 流程

summary.title: 将 seal overlap closeout 改为 agent 分类
summary.what: 更新 Mainline 面向 agent 的 seal closeout 指导，把 seal/sync 返回的 conflicts 明确定义为 phase-1 overlap warnings，而不是已判定的语义冲突；要求 agent 先 inspect/classify，只在不确定或疑似真实语义冲突时升级给用户，并默认不粘贴 raw JSON。同步更新 repo-local skill、完整 AGENTS 模板、短 AGENTS policy、Codex session-start hook 提示、agent context protocol 和中英文 reference 文档，并刷新本仓库 AGENTS 到 v28。
summary.why: 真实使用中 agent 遵循旧流程把弱 file-overlap JSON 原样贴给用户，但 Mainline 域模型本身只把 ConflictPair 当作 phase-1 advisory warning，phase-2 check 才是语义判断。旧 closeout 文案把底层 overlap signal 误导成用户必须看到的 conflict 事件，削弱了 agent 应承担的语义判断职责。
summary.user_goal: 修复 Mainline seal overlap conflict 的 agent closeout 流程

decisions.point: seal 后 conflicts 的 agent 语义
decisions.chose: 把 `conflicts` 响应描述为 phase-1 overlap warnings，并要求 agent 在 closeout 前先分类。
decisions.rationale: 字段名仍然兼容现有 JSON contract，但指导语避免把 file/subsystem overlap 误读为已确认的 semantic conflict。

decisions.chose: 默认不粘贴 raw JSON；只有 agent 无法分类、疑似真实语义冲突、用户要求 debug 细节或工具输出本身用于诊断时才升级。
decisions.rationale: 普通用户需要的是人能读懂的判断和下一步，而不是 phase-1 低层结构化噪音。

decisions.point: 同步面向 agent 的入口
decisions.chose: 同时更新 skill、完整模板、短 AGENTS policy、hook 注入提示和协议文档，并将模板版本 bump 到 v28。
decisions.rationale: 只改其中一个入口会继续让不同 agent 或新 session 收到旧的 verbatim closeout 规则。

decisions.chose: 为 Codex session-start context 和生成 AGENTS policy 增加断言，确认包含 overlap classification guidance，且不包含要求 verbatim 粘贴 overlap warning 的文案。
decisions.rationale: 这两个入口最容易直接影响 agent 行为，需要测试锁住。

rejected.alternative: 继续要求 agent 原样 surface `conflicts` JSON
rejected.reason: 这会把 phase-1 overlap signal 甩给用户，和 Mainline 让 agent 做语义判断的设计相冲突。

rejected.alternative: 仅改 docs/spec，不改 hook 和 skill
rejected.reason: Codex 真实行为主要受 skill 和 hook 注入提示影响，只改说明文档无法修复实际 closeout 流程。

rejected.alternative: 立即重命名 JSON 字段 `conflicts`
rejected.reason: 这会扩大兼容性影响；本次先修 agent-facing 流程语义，保留 wire contract。

review_notes: 验证过 go test ./internal/hooks -run TestDoesNotExist 用于编译 dispatcher 包。
验证过 go run . agents check --json，AGENTS.md 为 in_sync 且 installed_version/current_version 均为 28。
未跟踪目录 .agents/ 是本轮无关的既有本地状态，未纳入提交；seal 使用 --allow-dirty 仅记录该 dirty 状态。
曾尝试 go test ./internal/engine ./internal/hooks/...，超过四十秒无输出后中断，改为受影响包的窄测试。

architectural_claims: Seal-time `conflicts` remains a wire-compatible phase-1 warning surface; agent guidance now carries the semantic distinction between overlap warnings and real semantic conflicts.
Hooks remain context providers, but their injected closeout reminder now instructs agent judgment instead of raw escalation.
AGENTS managed policy version 28 includes the new overlap classification boundary.
behavioral_changes: Agents are instructed to inspect and classify seal-submit overlap warnings before final closeout.
Agents are instructed not to paste raw conflict JSON by default.
Agents escalate overlap warnings to users only when uncertain or likely semantic.
Generated AGENTS.md now mentions seal-time phase-1 overlap warning classification.
migration_notes: Existing JSON field names remain unchanged for compatibility.
Repos with managed AGENTS.md should run `mainline agents update` to pick up policy version 28 after this change ships.
Global Mainline skill installs still need the existing separate skill update path.
